top_rules_triggered.description: Flag any single transaction exceeding $10,000 for manual compliance review
Block transactions originating from or destined to sanctioned countries
Flag high-frequency transactions (>5 in 24h) for non-VIP accounts
Block all outgoing transactions for accounts with risk score > 80
Flag international transactions exceeding $25,000 for enhanced due diligence

rules.description: Flag any single transaction exceeding $10,000 for manual compliance review
Block transactions originating from or destined to sanctioned countries
Flag high-frequency transactions (>5 in 24h) for non-VIP accounts
Block and escalate any transaction exceeding $50,000 pending manual approval
Block transactions exceeding $10,000 from accounts less than 30 days old
Flag transactions >$5,000 from dormant accounts (180+ days inactive)
Block all outgoing transactions for accounts with risk score > 80
Flag international transactions exceeding $25,000 for enhanced due diligence
Flag transactions with currency conversion spread exceeding 5% above mid-market rate
Block users exceeding $500,000 cumulative daily transaction volume
Hold weekend/holiday transactions exceeding $15,000 for next-business-day review
